value.rationale: This offering is a built-in MCP server manager within Google's Antigravity product, enabling integration of external context providers via the Model Context Protocol. It maps directly to the mcp-connectors capability, covering only the server management/integration slice (partial) rather than the full breadth of hosted MCP servers, connector registries, and managed tool connectors. It is a feature/sub-product of google-antigravity-2-0, aligning with existing IDs like google-antigravity-2-0-mcp-connectors-*.
